ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time stamp for the data collection */,
  "s1" REAL /* Measurement from sensor 1 */,
  "s2" REAL /* Measurement from sensor 2 */,
  "m_cf" REAL /* Computed measurement based on sensor 1 */,
  "s1_cf" REAL /* Computed measurement based on sensor 1 and another factor */,
  "c" INTEGER /* A categorical value, potentially indicating a condition or state */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that generated the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data entry (e.g., environmental conditions, notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_c FOREIGN KEY ("c") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sensor is installed (if applicable) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed at the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., bridge, dam, pipeline) */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computed_values" (
  "computed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computed value */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time entry for the computed value */,
  "value" REAL /* The computed value itself */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the computation performed */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for computation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the computed value (e.g., validated, unvalidated, flagged) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the computed value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("computed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_required" TEXT /* Indicates if any action is required for the condition (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the condition was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time entry for the accessed data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used to access the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time entry for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time entry for the alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high reading, low reading, anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
